INDRAPRASTHA GAS LIMITED 
(A Joint Venture of GAIL (India) Ltd., BPCL & Govt. of NCT of Delhi) 
 
 
Ref. No.: IGL/CS/2024 
 
 
 
 
            August 2, 2024 
 
 
Listing Compliance 
 
Listing Department 
Bombay Stock Exchange Ltd. 
 
National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. 
1st Floor, P.J. Towers 
 
Exchange Plaza, Bandra Kurla Complex 
Dalal Street 
 
Bandra (E) 
Mumbai – 400 001 
 
Mumbai – 400 051 
 
 
 
Security Code : 532514 
 
Trading Symbol : IGL 
 
Sub: Link of Transcript of Conference Call 
 
Dear Sir / Madam, 
 
This is in continuation to our letter dated July 26, 2024. In this regard, please find below link 
of transcript of conference call held on July 26, 2024.  
 
https://www.iglonline.net/uploads/announcement/Transcript_of_Q1_2024-
25_Con_Call_held_on_July_26,_2024.pdf  
 
This is in compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure 
Requirements) Regulations, 2015. 
 
Yours sincerely, 
for Indraprastha Gas Limited, 
 
 
 
 
(S. K. Jain) 
Company Secretary 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
IGL Bhawan, Plot No. 4, Community Centre, R.K. Puram, Sector - 9, New Delhi-110 022 
Phone: 46074607 
Fax: 26171863
